body.title: OR inference: enable prompt caching when model supports it
body.result: cache_control on system message for 5 cacheable OR models; ModelSpec.cacheable property; DEBUG log on cache hit; 4 tests
body.description:
DeepSeek-v4-flash and several Qwen3 models on OpenRouter support prefix caching (cache-control headers in the OpenRouter request). When the same system prompt + repo context is sent across the 5 iterations of a tool loop, subsequent iterations should hit the cache, dropping input cost by up to 90%. Currently the InferenceDevice sends each request fresh.

Proposed shape: in InferenceDevice/InferenceSource, check ModelSpec.tags for 'cacheable' (or check OR's model metadata), and if present, add `cache_control: {type: 'ephemeral'}` to the system message in the request payload. Test by checking that the OR response `usage.cache_read_input_tokens` > 0 on second iteration.

**Affected files:** devices/inference/sources.py (OpenRouterSource request builder), devices/inference/models_registry.py (add 'cacheable' tag to supporting models)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; log cache hit tokens at DEBUG
**Scope boundary:** IN: cache_control header on system message; 'cacheable' tag in registry; cache hit logging. OUT: per-model cache TTL management, cross-session caching.
**Completion criteria:** Running two consecutive OR requests with the same session_id shows cache_read_input_tokens > 0 in the second response. Test or log line confirming the cache hit.
